title: emphusao #1720
definition:
1) to blow or breathe upon
 ++++
 This word used only once by the LXX translators in \\#Ge 2:7\\ where God
 breathed on Adam and he became a living soul. Just as the original
 creation was completed by an act of God, so to the new creation was
 completed by an act from the Head of the new creation. (AWP \\#Joh 20:22\\)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to blow or breathe upon
 ++++
 This word used only once by the LXX translators in \\#Ge 2:7\\ where God
 breathed on Adam and he became a living soul. Just as the original
 creation was completed by an act of God, so to the new creation was

    NASB:  to breathe into or upon:
